last_debrief: STORY SO FAR: wedding-hall thread (empty chair) closed out — 'appadi illa' landed (cold-fired earlier today, confirmed by the 18:03 knock), 'ippa-ve' still heard-not-fired but the thread itself is done. Andrew is mid-workday, acknowledged the last knock worked, asked to stay out of a lesson right now, and explicitly asked to leave the wedding hall behind for a new scene. New scene seeded below: the kitchen, post-wedding-hall. Next real session: open on the kitchen scene cold, and still circle back to 'ippa-ve' opportunistically since it never got fired.

payload: என்ன சமைக்கிற? (enna samaikkira — what are you cooking?)
சாப்பாடு ரெடி (saappaadu ready — food is ready)
soak_order.scene_seed: New scene, deliberate break from the wedding hall: Andrew walks into the kitchen (சமையலறை) — someone's cooking, he asks 'என்ன சமைக்கிற?', gets pulled in, and it lands as 'சுவையா இருக்கு' right before 'சாப்பாடு ரெடி' is called out. Light, domestic, low-stakes after the formality of the wedding-hall thread.

status: 8 episodes under-listened (~30 min). Re-listen playlist recommended before new production.
